Andrei Popescu
Electrical Site Manager
Location: Leeds

Profile
Electrical site manager with twelve years of site delivery across pharma, cleanroom, and regulated manufacturing environments. Strong in subcontractor coordination, QA/QC close-out, handover planning, and programme recovery on live projects.

Experience
2023 - Present | Electrical Site Manager | Northfield Life Sciences Projects
Lead electrical package delivery on a live cleanroom and pharmaceutical expansion in Yorkshire. Managed subcontractor coordination, daily site leadership, QA close-out, inspections, and handover planning with project and commissioning teams.

2020 - 2023 | Electrical Construction Manager | Apex Engineering
Managed electrical package delivery on a GMP manufacturing project. Owned labour planning, programme recovery, client reporting, and cross-trade interface through testing and completion.

2017 - 2020 | Electrical Supervisor | MEP Delivery Group
Supervised electrical subcontractors on regulated-build projects including cleanroom environments. Supported SSSTS-led site controls, inspections, and snag close-out.

Qualifications
SSSTS
ECS
First Aid

Availability
Available in four weeks. Open to site travel in Yorkshire and the North Midlands.
